0001.en: Remove the swimming person and the surfboard under him from the picture, and remove the ripples, splashes and bubbles.
0001.zh: 去除画面中正在游泳的人和他身下的冲浪板，去除扬起的波纹，水花和气泡

0002.en: Remove the person surfing in the middle of the picture and remove the ripples and splashes he produces.
0002.zh: 去除画面中间正在冲浪的一个人，去除他产生的波纹和水花

0003.en: Remove the turtle with its head sticking out of the water, and remove the ripples and splashes caused by it slapping the water.
0003.zh: 去除画面头探出水面的乌龟，去除它拍打水面产生的波纹和水花

0004.en: Remove all horse hooves from the frame and remove the dust and smoke caused by the hooves hitting the ground.
0004.zh: 去除画面中的所有马蹄，去除马蹄拍打土地产生的扬尘和烟雾

0005.en: Remove all birds and remove the ripples and splashes caused by birds hitting the water when they take off
0005.zh: 去除所有鸟类，去除鸟类起飞时拍打水面产生的波纹和水花

0006.en: Remove a cruise ship from the screen and remove the ripples produced by the cruise ship on the water.
0006.zh: 去除画面的一艘游船，去除这个游船在水上产生的波纹

0007.en: Remove tricycles with neon lights and remove the color produced by neon lights on the ground
0007.zh: 去除带有霓虹灯的三轮车，去除霓虹灯照射在地面上产生的颜色

0008.en: Remove the birds from the picture and remove the ripples caused by the birds on the water
0008.zh: 去除画面中的鸟类，去除鸟类在水面上造成的波纹

0009.en: Remove two white swans and remove the ripples caused by the swans swimming
0009.zh: 去除两只白色天鹅，去除天鹅游泳产生的波纹

0010.en: Remove water snakes and remove water ripples caused by swimming water snakes
0010.zh: 去除水蛇，去除水蛇游泳产生的水波纹

0011.en: Remove the propeller-type performance aircraft taking off and remove the white smoke emitted by the aircraft
0011.zh: 去除正在起飞的螺旋桨式表演飞机，去除飞机喷出的白色烟雾

0012.en: Remove the speedboat in the picture and remove the ripples and splashes produced by the speedboat on the water.
0012.zh: 去除画面中的快艇，去除快艇在水面上产生的波纹和水花

0013.en: Remove the man holding the surfboard in the middle of the picture, remove the ripples and water splashes he produced, and remove the splashing water droplets.
0013.zh: 去除画面中间拿着冲浪板的人，去除他产生的波纹和水花同时去除溅起的水滴

0014.en: Remove the surfer and the surfboard underneath him, and remove the ripples and splashes he creates
0014.zh: 去除正在冲浪的人和他身下的冲浪板，去除他产生的波纹和水花

0015.en: Remove the surfer and the surfboard underneath him, and remove the ripples and splashes he creates
0015.zh: 去除正在冲浪的人和他身下的冲浪板，去除他产生的波纹和水花

0016.en: Remove the surfer and the surfboard underneath him, and remove the ripples and splashes he creates
0016.zh: 去除正在冲浪的人和他身下的冲浪板，去除他产生的波纹和水花

0017.en: Remove the ship from the picture and remove the ripples and splashes produced by the ship
0017.zh: 去除画面中的轮船，去除轮船产生的波纹和水花

0018.en: Remove the cruise ship in the middle of the picture and remove the ripples and splashes produced by the cruise ship
0018.zh: 去除画面正中间的游船，去除游船产生的波纹和水花

0019.en: Remove the surfer and the surfboard underneath him, and remove the ripples and splashes he creates
0019.zh: 去除正在冲浪的人和他身下的冲浪板，去除他产生的波纹和水花

0020.en: Remove the two cruise ships in the picture and remove the ripples caused by the cruise ships
0020.zh: 去除画面中的两个游船，去除游船产生的波纹

0021.en: Remove the surfer and the surfboard underneath him, and remove the ripples and splashes he creates
0021.zh: 去除正在冲浪的人和他身下的冲浪板，去除他产生的波纹和水花

0022.en: Remove cruise ships and remove the ripples left by cruise ships on the water
0022.zh: 去除邮轮，去除邮轮在水上留下的波纹

0023.en: Remove whales, remove ripples and splashes caused by whales
0023.zh: 去除鲸鱼，去除鲸鱼产生的波纹和水花

0024.en: Remove the bear and remove the water splash caused by the running bear
0024.zh: 去除熊，去除熊跑动溅起的水花

0025.en: Remove the moving cruise ship and remove the water ripples it creates
0025.zh: 去除正在行驶的游船，去除它产生的水波纹

0026.en: Remove the moving cruise ship and remove the water ripples it creates
0026.zh: 去除正在行驶的游船，去除它产生的水波纹

0027.en: Remove the person surfing and his surfboard, and remove the ripples and splashes he creates
0027.zh: 去除正在冲浪的人以及他的冲浪板，去除他产生的波纹和水花

0028.en: Remove the person surfing and his surfboard, and remove the ripples and splashes he creates
0028.zh: 去除正在冲浪的人以及他的冲浪板，去除他产生的波纹和水花

0029.en: Remove the person surfing and his surfboard, and remove the ripples and splashes he creates
0029.zh: 去除正在冲浪的人以及他的冲浪板，去除他产生的波纹和水花

0030.en: Remove black swans and remove water ripples caused by black swans swimming by
0030.zh: 去除黑天鹅，去除黑天鹅游过产生的水波纹

0031.en: Remove the boat and remove the ripples and splashes caused by the boat
0031.zh: 去除船，去除船产生的波纹和水花

0032.en: Remove drifting cars on the road and remove the white smoke produced after the car drifts
0032.zh: 去除道路上正在漂移的汽车，去除汽车漂移车后产生的白色烟雾

0033.en: Remove drifting cars on the road and remove the white smoke produced after the car drifts
0033.zh: 去除道路上正在漂移的汽车，去除汽车漂移车后产生的白色烟雾

0034.en: Remove the walking flamingo and remove the ripples and splashes produced by this bird
0034.zh: 去除正在行走的火烈鸟，去除这个鸟类产生的波纹和水花

0035.en: Remove the surfer, the surfboard and the cable in his hand, and remove the ripples and splashes he creates
0035.zh: 去除正在冲浪的人，冲浪板和手中拉着的线缆，去除他产生的波纹和水花

0036.zh: 去除鸟类，去除产生的波纹和水花

0037.en: Remove the motorcycle and the rider in white riding the motorcycle, and remove the white smoke produced by the motorcycle
0037.zh: 去除摩托车和正在骑摩托车的白衣骑手，去除摩托车产生的白色烟雾

0038.en: Remove cars and remove dust and smoke generated by cars
0038.zh: 去除汽车，去除汽车产生的扬尘和烟雾

0039.en: Remove the skier and his skis, remove the white snow particles and smoke he raises and his shadow
0039.zh: 去除正在滑雪的人和他的滑雪板，去除他扬起的白色雪粒烟雾和他的影子

0040.en: Remove sailboats and people on sailboats, remove ripples and splashes produced
0040.zh: 去除帆船和帆船上的人，去除产生的波纹和水花

0041.en: Remove the car, remove the shadow of the car
0041.zh: 去除汽车，去除汽车的影子

0042.en: Remove the sailboat that starts to circle on the far right side of the screen and remove the water ripples produced by this sailboat.
0042.zh: 去除画面最右侧开始转圈行驶的帆船，去除这个帆船产生的水波纹

0043.en: Remove a swan from the picture and remove the ripples and splashes caused by its swimming
0043.zh: 去除画面的一只天鹅，去除它游泳产生的波纹和水花

0044.en: Remove all pandas so that the pallet cradle where the two pandas sit is no longer rocking
0044.zh: 去除所有大熊猫，让两只大熊猫所在的托盘式摇篮不再晃动

0045.en: Remove the car, remove the shadow of the car
0045.zh: 去除汽车，去除汽车的影子

0046.en: Remove the two bullfighting bulls and remove the clods and deformations caused by the bulls stepping on the ground.
0046.zh: 去除两只斗牛，去除牛踩在土地上扬起的土块和造成的形变

0047.en: Remove an elephant from the picture and remove the ripples and splashes produced by the elephant in the water.
0047.zh: 去除画面中的一只大象，去除这个象在水里产生的波纹和水花

0048.en: Remove a sailboat in the picture, remove the ripples produced by the sailboat and its reflection on the water
0048.zh: 去除画面中的一个帆船，去除这个帆船产生的波纹以及在水面上的倒影

0049.en: Remove birds whose heads dive into the water and remove the water ripples it creates
0049.zh: 去除头扎进水中的鸟类，去除它产生的水波纹

0050.en: Remove the walking human being, remove the ripples and reflections produced under his feet
0050.zh: 去除正在行走的人类，去除他脚下产生的波纹以及倒影

0051.en: Remove the plane at the bottom of the screen and remove the white trail produced by this plane.
0051.zh: 去除画面最下方的一个飞机，去除这个飞机产生的白色尾迹

0052.en: Remove the brown dog in the picture and remove the ripples and splashes produced by the dog in the water.
0052.zh: 去除画面中棕色的狗，去除这个狗在水中产生的波纹和水花

0053.en: Remove two cars and remove the smoke from their drift
0053.zh: 去除两辆汽车，去除它们漂移产生的烟雾

0054.en: Remove the one at the front of the picture and remove the dust and smoke raised by the zebra stepping on the ground.
0054.zh: 去除画面最前方的，去除这个斑马踩在地上扬起的尘土和烟雾

0055.en: Remove bears in water and remove ripples and splashes caused by bears
0055.zh: 去除在水中的熊，去除熊产生的波纹和水花

0056.en: Remove the spider, remove the newly woven silk threads of the spider and the deformation caused to the entire web
0056.zh: 去除蜘蛛，去除蜘蛛新织出来的丝线和对整个网的造成的形变

0058.en: Remove the drifting car and remove the white smoke it creates
0058.zh: 去除正在漂移的汽车，去除它产生的白色烟雾

0059.en: Remove all black swans from the picture and remove the water ripples caused by them
0059.zh: 去除画面中所有的黑天鹅，去除它造成的水波纹

0060.en: Remove the spinning bowl and remove the ripples and splashes it creates
0060.zh: 去除正在旋转的碗状船，去除它产生的波纹和水花

0061.en: Remove the landing seaplane and remove the ripples and splashes it creates
0061.zh: 去除正在降落的水上飞机，去除它产生的波纹和水花

0062.en: Remove the yellow ball and keep the movement of the human hand unchanged
0062.zh: 去除黄色小球，保持人手的动作不变

0063.zh: 去除透明盘子上的胶带

0064.en: Remove the paper and let the water pour on the table
0064.zh: 去除纸张，让水倒在桌面上

0066.zh: 去除半透明白色塑料杯

0067.en: Remove the sunglasses and keep the remote control as is
0067.zh: 去除墨镜，保持遥控器不变

0069.en: Remove the transparent plastic cup and keep the human hand movements unchanged
0069.zh: 去除透明塑料杯，保持人手的动作不变

0071.en: Remove the cosmetic bottle held by the person's hand, keeping the movement of the person's hand unchanged
0071.zh: 去除人手中拿着的化妆品瓶，保持人手的动作不变

0074.en: Remove the yellow ball and remove the reflection it creates in the metal plate
0074.zh: 去除黄色小球，去除金属盘里它产生的反光

0075.en: Remove the plastic bottle and remove the water ripples and bubbles it creates, keeping the movements of the human hand unchanged
0075.zh: 去除塑料瓶，去除它产生的水波纹和气泡，保持人手的动作不变

0076.en: Remove the transparent glass and remove the shadow caused by the glass
0076.zh: 去除透明玻璃杯，去除玻璃杯产生的影子
